text:
struct aclprofTensor {
    uint32_t type;         // tensor类型, 0: input, 1: output
    uint32_t format;       // format类型： aclFormat
    uint32_t dataType;     // dataType类型 aclDataType
    uint32_t shapeDim;     // shape dim <= 8
    uint32_t shape[8];     // shape
}

[kernel_class] struct singlecoreloopparam uint32 singleloopcorerownum singlecoreloopcount singlecorelooptail
text:
struct SingleCoreLoopParam {
    uint32_t singleLoopCoreRowNum{0}; // row num processed in single loop
    uint32_t singleCoreLoopCount{0};  // loop count in single loop
    uint32_t singleCoreLoopTail{0};   // row num of last loop in single core
    uint32_t splitK{0};               // single split num in k direction
    uint32_t loopK{0};                // loop count in k direction
    uint32_t tailK{0};                // tail num in k direction
}

[kernel_entry] global vector void scatter custom gm
text:
__global__ __vector__ void scatter_custom(GM_ADDR srcGm, GM_ADDR dstOffsetGm, GM_ADDR dstGm)   
{
    uint32_t count = 128;                                                                                                
    KernelScatter<half> op;                                                                                
    op.Init(srcGm, dstOffsetGm, dstGm, count);                                                            
    op.Process();                                                                                         
}
